---
title: Guides
listing:
  id: guides
  template: ./_templates/accordion.ejs.md
  contents: guides
  categories: true
  filter-ui: [title]
  template-params:
    type: Guide
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style type="text/css">
    .handbook-title {
      text-align: center;
    }
    #title-block-header {
      display: none;
    }
    </style>
---
::: {.guides-main}
::: {.text-center .px-5}
::: {.main-title}
![](public/guides-icon.svg){width=2em}    
Guides
:::
These guides help you find answers to questions that come up while doing research. They help guide you through various topics at once.
:::

---

:::{#guides .py-5}
:::
:::
